subject: 2-Step Verification turned on
body:
[image: Google]
2-Step Verification turned on


chemutaigrace76@gmail.com

Your Google Account chemutaigrace76@gmail.com is now protected with 2-Step
Verification. When you sign in on a new or untrusted device, you’ll need
your second factor to verify your identity.

*Don't get locked out!*
You can add a backup phone or get backup codes to use when you don’t have
your second factor with you.
You can review your 2SV settings
<https://accounts.google.com/AccountChooser?Email=chemutaigrace76@gmail.com&continue=https://myaccount.google.com/signinoptions/twosv?rfn%3D16%26rfnc%3D1%26eid%3D-2358095851283353215%26et%3D0>
